'''Tendd''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] whose territory including the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bethal]]<ref name="GNN11" /> in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector's]] [[Pelagia Province]]<ref name="LotE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref> during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The Moff's declaration of Bethal as a disaster world after a [[Greddleback termite/Legends|greddleback termite]] infestation helped the planet to recover and receive emergency aid.
